channel.title: OpenAI-Selection
channel.description: OpenAI News から選別された記事フィード

item.title: ChatGPTはあなたの最も野心的な仕事のパートナーになりました(ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work)
item.description: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

item.title: GPT-5.5 バイオバグバウンティ(GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty)
item.description: Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program

item.title: GPT-5.6: あなたの野心に合わせてスケールするフロンティアインテリジェンス(GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition)
item.description: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.
